entries.summary: Phase 6 implementation is intentionally aligned. WASM fallback removed because web-llm v0.2.83 has no WASM compute backend — only WebGPU. This was discovered during implementation and confirmed by reviewer. Cancel/download is documented as best-effort since CreateMLCEngine doesn't support aborting init. Tab visibility is a minor omission from watchdog — not blocking for FR-015 compliance. All other drift items are cosmetic documentation gaps, not functional issues.
entries.requirementCoverage: {"phase": 6, "totalRequirements": 8, "covered": 8, "gaps": ["WASM fallback intentionally removed (no such backend in web-llm v0.2.83)"]}
